Sepideh Farsi, filmmaker: 'We are witnessing the destruction of Iranian heritage, culture and environment'
subhead: The Iranian director shares her anguish over the consequences of American airstrikes on her country. Beyond the loss of life and material devastation, she reflects on the wonders of Iranian civilization and culture that have been permanently scarred.

title: Measuring insect decline by photographing your license plate is a 'simple and brilliant' idea
subhead: On April 13, France's National Museum of Natural History announced the launch of a citizen science project modeled after a similar initiative that was established in 2021 in the United Kingdom.

title: Kanye West postpones Marseille concert after France considers blocking him from performing
subhead: The US rapper postponed his concert in Marseille after he was blocked from entering the UK over antisemitic remarks and voicing admiration for Adolf Hitler.

title: Trump Organization's Vietnam golf project sparks protests and corruption allegations
subhead: Signed just before the 2024 US presidential election, the project has caused divisions within the government and sparked anger among local residents, who have been offered extremely low compensation for the seizure of their land.

New online search tool in Germany reveals if ancestors were Nazi Party members
subhead: In partnership with American and German archives, the weekly 'Die Zeit' has launched a searchable tool granting access to more than 12 million documents, cataloging the bulk of Nazi Party (NSDAP) memberships from 1925 to 1945.

title: French court condemns 'organized, opaque and illegal' terrorist funding system in Lafarge trial
subhead: During the ruling, the president of the court drew an explicit connection between the 'commercial partnership' that the French cement company had entered with terrorist groups and the attacks that were then carried out by those groups.

title: American Catholics outraged at Trump's attack of pope and AI-generated image of himself as Christ
subhead: The US president claimed, against all plausibility, that the image he posted on social media showed him as a doctor, but he was forced to take it down. The post, along with his lengthy tirade against Leo XIV, left believers stunned.
